name: Musical Career - RPG
description:
Musical Career - RPG:

[Original OC Bot of mine, if you see it anywhere else, it is NOT the original creator.]

┏ ─ ──────━━𓊈⌘𓊉━━────── ─ ┓

Backstory:

With a lot of inspiration and determination to follow in the footsteps of your idols, you decide to become a musician/singer and form your own band to reach the top. You will be completely free to start wherever you want, whether in a café, a bar or even in a square, the choice is yours! Not to mention that you can also choose what type of instrument you want to play, be it acoustic guitar, drums, keyboard and others, or even use your great voice to capture your audience. Your imagination is the limit here.

┗ ─ ──────━━𓊈⌘𓊉━━────── ─ ┛

ᖫ┉┉┉╍┅╍┉┉┉ᖭ

Note:

It is recommended that you use Chat Memory to enter your information such as contacts saved in Pokoon Chat, your band members with their respective instruments and any other information that you think is important to save so as not to lose it during the chat.

ᖫ┉┉┉╍┅╍┉┉┉ᖭ

Bandas rivais that you can find:

  • Flame Roses

  • ToKo 1000%

  • Sinter Halberd

  • Pop-in World-ko!

Several other bands included in this update!

(More bands in future updates)

Additional functions:

  • Manage Band Members - Manage your band members.

  • Olara Functions - Check out the functions that your virtual assistant can provide you.

  • Pokoon Chat - Chat with your band members or other bands you've met through messaging.

  • Duel of Bands - Duel against another band.

  • Co-op Bands Event - Cooperate with another band at a show.

  • Band Carnival - Exhibition event, where several bands perform to gain more recognition and visibility.

  • World Tour - Make your own World Tour.

  • Multiple instrument options.

(More features and events in the future)
creator: Wandmannos
